EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IRasterItemDescription

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to the properties of a raster item description for adding a raster.

[Guid("E7A23083-B9BB-41BF-9253-C148B0AB033E")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterItemDescription

Properties

BuildPyramids

Indicates whether pyramids are built for the raster item.

bool BuildPyramids { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

BuildThumbnail

Indicates whether thumbnails are built and saved for the raster item.

bool BuildThumbnail { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ComputeStatistics

Indicates whether histogram statistics are computed for the raster item.

bool ComputeStatistics { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

DataFileNames

The data file names.

IStringArray DataFileNames { get; set; }

Property Value

IStringArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

DataFileURLs

The data file URLs.

IStringArray DataFileURLs { get; set; }

Property Value

IStringArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeodataXform

The georefencing of the raster item.

IGeodataXform GeodataXform { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeodataXform

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeodataXformApplyMethod

The method used for applying the GeodataXform.

esriGeodataXformApplyMethod GeodataXformApplyMethod { get; set; }

Property Value

esriGeodataXformApplyMethod

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaximumCellSizeFactor

The maximum visible cell size factor.

double MaximumCellSizeFactor { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

MinimumCellSizeFactor

The minimum visible cell size factor.

double MinimumCellSizeFactor { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Properties

The raster item properties.

IPropertySet Properties { get; set; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

Type

The raster item type, i.e. a raster type name.

string Type { get; set; }

Property Value

string
